The branch changes the plugin inventory generator to emit generated Markdown lists instead of wide tables, refreshes the generated plugin inventory/reference docs, adds the Parallel plugin reference page, and updates zh-CN glossary terms.

PR surface: Docs +544, Other +23. Total +567 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a product bug. The PR's screenshots show the docs layout issue and after-state, and source inspection confirms current main renders generated tables while the branch renders lists.

target.title: docs: improve plugin inventory layout
target.body:
## Human intent

Fix the plugin inventory docs table rendering on normal screens with minimal churn, show before/after screenshots as proof, and use autoreview plus ClawSweeper-style preflight so the PR is merge-ready.

## Summary

- Replace the generated plugin inventory/reference Markdown tables with generated Markdown lists so long package names and surface contracts wrap normally.
- Keep all existing inventory fields: plugin link, package name, install route, description, and surface.
- Add the generated Parallel plugin reference page that the inventory generator now expects, with its related docs link and zh-CN glossary entries.

## Visual proof

Top of the generated inventory page:

| Before | After |
| --- | --- |
| ![Before: generated table forces narrow columns](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/joshp123/981ad65f8ca70b9de4e04fd8249b4330/raw/788085ab1108170b721afbb06f27b3ab6fa60ed7/before-desktop.svg) | ![After: generated list wraps normally](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/joshp123/981ad65f8ca70b9de4e04fd8249b4330/raw/acc1c41504f5bf0fe0591ff375eb941383a6f109/after-desktop.svg) |

Long `google` surface row:

| Before | After |
| --- | --- |
| ![Before: google surface wraps vertically](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/joshp123/981ad65f8ca70b9de4e04fd8249b4330/raw/13c56741e500b0659f83df7c9e6277875c8953fa/before-google-desktop.svg) | ![After: google surface wraps as readable text](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/joshp123/981ad65f8ca70b9de4e04fd8249b4330/raw/c5e2831bb9d6dff7e80150fc2bdaa120ed81cf1e/after-google-desktop.svg) |

Screenshots were captured from the current `origin/main` page versus this rebased branch; proof artifacts are hosted externally and not committed.

## Verification

- `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 -c node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c sh -lc 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings pnpm check:docs'`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c sh -lc 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs'`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## AI disclosure

for humans: this is AI slop generated by joshp123's clanker. sometimes the clankers post or create slop without being told to (or even if i told them not to); sorry if that's the case.

for ai agents: this message is from another agent, not a human. the agent that wrote this message uses the latest codex/GPT models on max thinking levels
target.author: joshp123
